_comment: Chain topology demo: a VPS FRONT edge whose forward-auth is enforced one hop DOWNSTREAM (the home edge). auth_downstream suppresses the spurious public_without_auth warning and labels hosts 'auth: downstream'. The seed mirrors the real nested-subroute VPS edge. Try: crenel status -config examples/settings-chain-frontedge.json ; crenel audit -config examples/settings-chain-frontedge.json
